mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( order_number, user_id, status, amount, remark, expected_time ) VALUES ( #{orderNumber}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{expectedTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_number, user_id, status, amount, remark, expected_time, cancel_reason, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT o.id, o.order_number, o.user_id, o.status, o.amount, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS total_quantity, o.remark, o.expected_time, o.cancel_reason, o.create_time, o.update_time FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.id = #{id} AND o.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY o.id, o.order_number, o.user_id, o.status, o.amount, o.remark, o.expected_time, o.cancel_reason, o.create_time, o.update_time LIMIT 1

SELECT o.id, o.order_number, o.status, o.amount, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS total_quantity, o.remark, o.expected_time, o.create_time FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY o.id, o.order_number, o.status, o.amount, o.remark, o.expected_time, o.create_time ORDER BY o.create_time DESC, o.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = 5, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status NOT IN (4, 5)
